SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlotterysystem

Class EventItem

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlotterysystem.EventItem
public class EventItem extends Object
Event class that is a container for all information related to an event

    Description

  • Constructor Details

    • EventItem

      public EventItem(String id, String title, String description)
      creates the Event Object
      Parameters:
      id - String identification for the database
      title - Name of the event
      description - This describes what the Event is about

    • EventItem

      public EventItem(String id, String title, String description, String location, String posterUrl, int maxEntrants, int maxParticipants, int totalEntrants, Date registrationDeadline, Date eventDate, boolean requiresGeolocation, String hostUid, String hostDisplayName)
      This creates the Event Object
      Parameters:
      id - String identification for the database
      title - Name of the event
      description - This describes what the Event is about
      location - the place that the event takes place
      posterUrl - link to the event image
      maxEntrants - limit to the number of signups
      maxParticipants - limit to the number of people going to the event
      totalEntrants - current number of Entrants signed up (should always be 0)
      registrationDeadline - when entrants will no longer be able to sign up of an event
      eventDate - when the event takes place
      requiresGeolocation - boolean of if entrant need to be close to the event location to sign up
      hostUid - String identification of Author for the database
      hostDisplayName - String Name of Author for the database

    • EventItem

      public EventItem(String id, String title, String description, String location, String posterUrl, int maxEntrants, int maxParticipants, int totalEntrants, Date registrationDeadline, Date eventDate, boolean requiresGeolocation, String hostUid, String hostDisplayName, boolean waitlistOpen, String winningMessage)
      This creates the Event Object
      Parameters:
      id - String identification for the database
      title - Name of the event
      description - This describes what the Event is about
      location - the place that the event takes place
      posterUrl - link to the event image
      maxEntrants - limit to the number of signups
      maxParticipants - limit to the number of people going to the event
      totalEntrants - current number of Entrants signed up (should always be 0)
      registrationDeadline - when entrants will no longer be able to sign up of an event
      eventDate - when the event takes place
      requiresGeolocation - boolean of if entrant need to be close to the event location to sign up
      hostUid - String identification of Author for the database
      hostDisplayName - String Name of Author for the database
      waitlistOpen - whether the waitlist is accepting sign-ups
      winningMessage - what to be displayed to a Entrant if they get selected

    • EventItem

      public EventItem(String id, String title, String description, String location, String posterUrl, int maxEntrants, int maxParticipants, int totalEntrants, Date registrationDeadline, Date eventDate, boolean requiresGeolocation, String hostUid, String hostDisplayName, List<String> coorganizers, boolean waitlistOpen, String winningMessage, List<String> keywords, boolean isPublic)
      This creates the Event Object
      Parameters:
      id - String identification for the database
      title - Name of the event
      description - This describes what the Event is about
      location - the place that the event takes place
      posterUrl - link to the event image
      maxEntrants - limit to the number of signups
      maxParticipants - limit to the number of people going to the event
      totalEntrants - current number of Entrants signed up (should always be 0)
      registrationDeadline - when entrants will no longer be able to sign up of an event
      eventDate - when the event takes place
      requiresGeolocation - boolean of if entrant need to be close to the event location to sign up
      hostUid - String identification of Author for the database
      hostDisplayName - String Name of Author for the database
      coorganizers - users who can manage the event in addition to the host
      waitlistOpen - whether the waitlist is accepting sign-ups
      winningMessage - what to be displayed to a Entrant if they get selected
      keywords - labels attached to the event
      isPublic - whether the event should be visible to all users

    • EventItem

      public EventItem(String id, String title, String description, String location, String posterUrl, int maxEntrants, int maxParticipants, int totalEntrants, Date registrationDeadline, Date eventDate, boolean requiresGeolocation, String hostUid, String hostDisplayName, boolean waitlistOpen, String winningMessage, List<String> keywords, boolean isPublic)
      This creates the Event Object
      Parameters:
      id - String identification for the database
      title - Name of the event
      description - This describes what the Event is about
      location - the place that the event takes place
      posterUrl - link to the event image
      maxEntrants - limit to the number of signups
      maxParticipants - limit to the number of people going to the event
      totalEntrants - current number of Entrants signed up
      registrationDeadline - when entrants will no longer be able to sign up of an event
      eventDate - when the event takes place
      requiresGeolocation - boolean of if entrant need to be close to the event location to sign up
      hostUid - String identification of Author for the database
      hostDisplayName - String Name of Author for the database
      waitlistOpen - whether the waitlist is accepting sign-ups
      winningMessage - what to be displayed to a Entrant if they get selected
      keywords - labels attached to the event
      isPublic - whether the event should be visible to all users

  • Method Details

    • getId

      public String getId()
      getter for ID
      Returns:
      string ID of Event

    • getTitle

      public String getTitle()
      getter for Event Title
      Returns:
      string Title of Event

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()
      getter for Event Description
      Returns:
      string Description of Event

    • getLocation

      public String getLocation()
      getter for Event Location
      Returns:
      string representation of event location

    • getPosterUrl

      public String getPosterUrl()
      getter for link of Event Image
      Returns:
      link to image from database

    • getMaxEntrants

      public int getMaxEntrants()
      getter for Max Entrants
      Returns:
      int limit of how many sign-ups are allowed

    • getMaxParticipants

      public int getMaxParticipants()
      getter for Max Participants
      Returns:
      int limits of how many Entrants can be chosen/confirmed

    • getTotalEntrants

      public int getTotalEntrants()
      getter for Total Entrants
      Returns:
      int current number of Entrants who have signed up

    • getRegistrationDeadline

      public Date getRegistrationDeadline()
      getter for Registration Deadline
      Returns:
      standard date format of the deadline to sign-up

    • getEventDate

      public Date getEventDate()
      getter for the Event Date
      Returns:
      standard date format of the date the event occurs

    • isRequiresGeolocation

      public boolean isRequiresGeolocation()
      getter for requiresGeolocation boolean
      Returns:
      whether the entrant must be in the same region as the event to sign-up

    • getHostUid

      public String getHostUid()
      getter for Author ID
      Returns:
      string ID of Event Creator User

    • getHostDisplayName

      public String getHostDisplayName()
      getter for Author Name
      Returns:
      Name of Event Creator

    • getCoorganizers

      public List<String> getCoorganizers()
      getter for co-organizer user ids
      Returns:
      immutable list of users who can manage the event

    • isWaitlistOpen

      public boolean isWaitlistOpen()
      getter for waitlistOpen boolean
      Returns:
      whether the any entrant is allowed to sign-up

    • getWinningMessage

      public String getWinningMessage()
      getter for winningMessage text
      Returns:
      String to be displayed to a User if they get selected

    • getKeywords

      public List<String> getKeywords()
      getter for keywords
      Returns:
      immutable list of event keywords

    • isPublic

      public boolean isPublic()
      getter for public/private visibility
      Returns:
      whether the event is visible to all users
